OpenTunnel.name: OpenTunnel
OpenTunnel.description: Grants permission to establish SSH connection to an EC2 instance using EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint

SendSSHPublicKey.name: SendSSHPublicKey
SendSSHPublicKey.description: Grants permission to push an SSH public key to the specified EC2 instance to be used for standard SSH

SendSerialConsoleSSHPublicKey.name: SendSerialConsoleSSHPublicKey
SendSerialConsoleSSHPublicKey.description: Grants permission to push an SSH public key to the specified EC2 instance to be used for serial console SSH

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags associated with the resource

ec2-instance-connect:maxTunnelDuration.description: Filters access by maximum session duration associated with the instance

ec2-instance-connect:privateIpAddress.description: Filters access by private IP Address associated with the instance

ec2-instance-connect:remotePort.description: Filters access by port number associated with the instance

ec2:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags associated with the resource

ec2:osuser.description: Filters access by specifying the default user name for the AMI that you used to launch your instance
